question_text: A device has an efficiency of 60%. What does this mean?

options.label: A
options.text: 60% of the device breaks down after use

options.label: B
options.text: 60% of the input energy is converted to useful energy, and 40% is wasted

options.label: C
options.text: The device uses 60% less energy than other devices

options.label: D
options.text: The device produces 60% more energy than it uses

explanation: Efficiency is the ratio of useful output energy to input energy, expressed as a percentage. An efficiency of 60% means 40% of the energy is lost, often as heat.
